Name: bOcclusion
Description: Sound occlusion in games refers to a process that imitates how sounds are perceived in "closed" environments, closed meaning that there are barriers close to the sound source or listener. It's can drop performance dramatically with a large number of agents or other sound sources.

Name: bOcclusionFilter
Description: All FMOD_SOFTWARE (and FMOD_HARDWARE on 3DS and NGP) with FMOD_3D based voices will add a software lowpass filter effect into the DSP chain which is automatically used when Channel::set3DOcclusion is used or the geometry API.

Name: bHrtfFilter
Description: All FMOD_SOFTWARE (and FMOD_HARDWARE on 3DS and NGP) with FMOD_3D based voices will add a software lowpass filter effect into the DSP chain which causes sounds to sound duller when the sound goes behind the listener.

Name: bDistanceFilter
Description: All FMOD_SOFTWARE with FMOD_3D based voices will add a software lowpass and highpass filter effect into the DSP chain which will act as a distance-automated bandpass filter.

Name: bWasapiExclusive
Description: Win32 Vista only - for WASAPI output - Enable exclusive access to hardware, lower latency at the expense of excluding other applications from accessing the audio hardware.
